summary: Iteration 91 - Saved Views & Personal Queue Presets feature testing completed. Backend: 15/15 tests passed for CRUD operations on saved views (POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/inventory-ledger/saved-views), view_type validation (422 for invalid), default uniqueness enforcement, and Operations Queue integration (saved_views_count, default_view_name). Frontend: All UI elements verified - Save View button, Views button with badge count, Views panel with saved views list, Save View dialog with name/notes/default inputs and current filters summary, action buttons (star/save/trash), active view badge in header, and Saved Views summary card. All regression tests passed (activity, assignment, escalation endpoints).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 91 - Saved Views feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/inventory-ledger/saved-views. View types: operations_queue, sales_orders, po_drafts. Default uniqueness enforced per view_type + created_by. Operations Queue returns saved_views_count and default_view_name in response. Frontend: OperationsQueuePage.js has full implementation - Views button (badge count), Views panel (list with action buttons), Save View dialog (name/notes/default/filter summary), active view badge, auto-load default on mount via useRef. One existing saved view ('My High Priority Unassigned') was present from previous setup. All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing.

create_saved_view.default_uniqueness: Only one default per view_type + created_by - creating new default unsets previous

update_saved_view.default_uniqueness: Setting is_default=true unsets other defaults for same view_type+created_by

OperationsQueuePage.summary_card: Saved Views card shows when count > 0 (data-testid='ops-queue-saved-views-count')
OperationsQueuePage.active_view_badge: data-testid='active-view-badge' - shows view name and default star
OperationsQueuePage.auto_load_default: On mount via useRef(defaultLoaded), loads default view filters

SavedViewsPanel.location: Absolute positioned dropdown from Views button
features: List of views with name/notes/default star

Button to save current filters as new view
